headline: Charter Pushes Deeper Into AI Contact Centers With RingCentral Tie-Up
summary: Charter Communications (NasdaqGS:CHTR) expanded its partnership with RingCentral to offer AI-powered contact center solutions to Spectrum Business customers. The new offering includes RingCX, an omnichannel contact center platform, and AI Conversation Expert (ACE) for conversation intelligence and analytics. The solutions target mid-market and enterprise Spectrum Business clients seeking integrated voice, video, and digital customer engagement tools. For Charter, known primarily for its...
